case_title: OSBORNE JOSEPHINE VS COHEA MELVIN et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AEREO TRAVEL GROUP CRUISE QTS
TRIAL RESET TO APR-07-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02 TRIAL OF MAR-02-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSBORNE JOSEPHINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COHEA MELVIN $75.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $83.00, DEFT INITIALLY ISSUED "DAY" FLIGHT BY MISTAKE. HOWEVER,PLTF CONTRIBUTED TO LOS BY NOT CONTACTING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
